# Azion Docs — store

> All pages of the store section. Root index: https://www.azion.com/en/llms.txt

- [KV Store](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/kv-store/): KV Store is a distributed key-value storage service that runs across Azion's network, providing low-latency data persistence and retrieval.
- [How to manage KV Store with Functions](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/kv-store/guides/manage-with-functions/): Learn how to store, retrieve, and delete data using KV Store within your functions.
- [How to use KV Store with Redis-compatible SDK](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/kv-store/guides/redis-compatibility/): Learn how to use the Azion KV SDK with a Redis-like interface for seamless integration with your applications.
- [Object Storage](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/object-storage/): Azion Object Storage is a scalable and secure storage service designed to integrate object storage with the Azion Web Platform using the S3 standard.
- [Implement an Authentication Layer for Object Storage with Functions](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/object-storage/guides/auth-layer-object-storage-functions/): Learn how to create a secure authentication layer to control access to your Object Storage buckets using Azion Functions and JWT validation.
- [Upload & Download Objects from a Bucket](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/object-storage/guides/bucket-actions/): Learn how to upload and download files from your object storage.
- [How to create and modify an Object Storage bucket](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/object-storage/guides/create-and-modify-bucket/): Learn how to create, rename, or delete your buckets from Object Storage using the Azion API.
- [How to create an Object Storage bucket](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/object-storage/guides/create-bucket/): Learn how to create a new read-only bucket and attribute read-write permissions to it using the Azion API.
- [How to delete an Object Storage bucket](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/object-storage/guides/delete-buckets/): Learn how to delete the buckets in your account using the Azion API and Azion CLI.
- [How to delete an object from an Object Storage bucket](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/object-storage/guides/delete-object/): Learn how to delete files from an Object Storage bucket with this guide.
- [How to download an object from an Object Storage bucket](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/object-storage/guides/download-object/): Discover how to download files from an Object Storage bucket with a comprehensive guide.
- [How to list Object Storage buckets](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/object-storage/guides/list-buckets/): Learn how to list all the buckets in your account using the Azion API and Azion CLI.
- [How to list objects in an Object Storage bucket](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/object-storage/guides/list-objects/): Discover how to list objects in an Object Storage bucket with this guide.
- [Set up S3 credentials for Object Storage](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/object-storage/guides/s3-protocol-for-object-storage/): Object Storage offers compatibility with the S3 protocol through credentials. Generate an access key and a secret key for any bucket that you own to allow specific operations for each access verified with the credential.
- [How to update an Object Storage bucket](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/object-storage/guides/update-buckets/): Learn how to update the buckets in your account using the Azion API and Azion CLI.
- [How to update an object from an Object Storage bucket](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/object-storage/guides/update-object/): Discover how to update files from an Object Storage bucket with a comprehensive guide.
- [How to upload an object to an Object Storage bucket](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/object-storage/guides/upload-object/): Discover how to upload files to an Object Storage bucket with this guide.
- [Use an Object Storage Bucket as Origin](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/object-storage/guides/use-bucket-as-origin/): Learn how to use a bucket as the origin of a static applications using Object Storage and make the bucket content public.
- [Use S3-compatible tools with Object Storage](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/object-storage/guides/use-s3-compatible-tools-with-object-storage/): Learn how to integrate Azion Object Storage with S3-compatible tools, SDKs, and CLIs to manage buckets and objects with low latency and zero DTO cost.
- [Azion Store](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/overview/): Store, query, and manage data close to your users and applications with Azion Store products.
- [SQL Database](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/sql-database/): Explore SQL Database, a distributed database solution by Azion. It allows you to manage databases, run queries, and ensure data resilience effortlessly.
- [How to create an SQL Database database](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/sql-database/guides/create-database/): Learn how to create an SQL Database database.
- [How to create a table in SQL Database](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/sql-database/guides/create-table/): Discover step-by-step instructions to create a table in an SQL Database database for efficient data management.
- [How to create and query data on SQL Database](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/sql-database/guides/create-tables-sql-database/): Learn how to create and list tables and add data in SQL Database databases using the Azion REST API.
- [How to delete an SQL Database database](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/sql-database/guides/delete-database/): Learn how to delete an SQL Database database.
- [How to delete a record in an SQL Database database](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/sql-database/guides/delete-record/): Discover step-by-step instructions to delete a record in an SQL Database database for efficient data management.
- [How to import data to SQL Database](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/sql-database/guides/import-data-sql-database/): This guide explains how to import data into your database using SQL Database Shell.
- [How to insert data into an SQL Database table](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/sql-database/guides/insert-into-table/): Learn how to insert data into an SQL Database table using the Azion API.
- [How to install SQL Database Shell](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/sql-database/guides/install-edge-sql-shell/): Learn how to install SQL Database Shell to interact with your SQL Database database.
- [How to list SQL Database databases](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/sql-database/guides/list-databases/): Learn how to list SQL Database databases.
- [How to manage an SQL Database database](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/sql-database/guides/manage-sql-database/): Learn how to create, list, and delete databases from SQL Database using the Azion REST API.
- [How to retrieve data from tables in SQL Database](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/sql-database/guides/retrieve-data-sql-database/): This comprehensive guide provides step-by-step instructions to efficiently list and retrieve data from SQL Database databases using the Azion REST API.
- [Retrieve Data with SQL Database & Functions](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/sql-database/guides/retrieve-data-with-functions/): See how to retrieve data from an existing database (DB) with SQL Database and Functions.
- [How to retrieve an SQL Database database information](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/sql-database/guides/retrieve-db-info/): Learn how to retrieve an SQL Database database information.
- [How to use SQL Database Shell commands](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/sql-database/guides/sql-database-shell-commands/): Learn how to use SQL Database Shell commands to interact with your SQL Database database.
- [How to implement SQL Database Vector Search](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/sql-database/guides/sql-database-vector-search/): Implement semantic search engines using Langchain and Azion SQL Database API in a TypeScript application.
- [SQL Database Vector Search](https://www.azion.com/en/documentation/store/sql-database/reference/vector-search/): Use Vector Search to implement semantic search engines, offering enhanced experiences and attending to advanced use cases.
